languages.text: "Сколько раз в день Эоганн говорит "это неоспоримый факт"?"
"How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"
languages.original_text: "Сколько раз в день Эоганн говорит "это неоспоримый факт"?"

traits.locale_text: "How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"
"How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"
"How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"

languages.text: «¿Cuántas veces al día dice Eogunn lo de "es un hecho irrefutable"?».
languages.original_text: "How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cuántas veces al día dice Eogunn lo de "es un hecho irrefutable"?».

languages.text: “伊奥贡一天要说多少遍‘这一点毋庸置疑’‘这是不争的事实’？”
languages.original_text: "How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡一天要说多少遍‘这一点毋庸置疑’‘这是不争的事实’？”

languages.text: « Combien de fois par jour Eogunn dit-il : "C'est un fait indéniable, irréfutable ou incontestable" ? »
languages.original_text: "How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"

traits.locale_text: « Combien de fois par jour Eogunn dit-il : "C'est un fait indéniable, irréfutable ou incontestable" ? »

languages.text: "Wie oft am Tag sagt Eogunn 'Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache'?"
languages.original_text: "How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"

traits.locale_text: "Wie oft am Tag sagt Eogunn 'Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache'?"

languages.text: エオグンは1日に何回、"これは揺るぎない事実だ "と言っているのだろうか？
languages.original_text: "How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"

languages.text: "Eogunn günde kaç kez 'Bu, tartışılmaz bir gerçektir.' veya benzeri şeyler diyor?"
languages.original_text: "How many times a day does Eogunn say 'this is an incontrovertible fact'?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn günde kaç kez 'Bu, tartışılmaz bir gerçektir.' veya benzeri şeyler diyor?"
